twitch_info.title: this is like when you play stage 3 of K3

message.body: ka1b3ast is now live! Streaming I Wanna Kill the Kamilia 3: this is like when you play stage 3 of K3
Kai did you see my message I sent you last night?
I just tried a 7-star in Geometry Dash...
90 attempts in practice, it's so damn hard!
I guess the tomato kills you
Funny enough, the Geometry Dash level I played has the same music used in Black Blizzard!
The level was fun, but it's too hard for me...
Yeah I remember you shitting on it snwbeaLol snwbeaLol
Isn't that ironic? I beat an 8-star, but I'm finding a 7-star to be so much harder.
Kai do you think I should go back to that level I was trying?
I'm going to be honest, the first cube and ball are so easy for me
Then as soon as the spider part rolls around, it's so hard from there...
Yeah but then it gets boring after a while
I'll let you know what the damage (attempt number) is!
I have a looooong way to go for this level...
I kinda want you to play the level and give me tips
Like you did for that gauntlet level and Speed Racer
I fluked it from, I think it was 58?
Yeah I need your help again
This ad is fucking hurting my eyes
They should have an epilepsy warning
I'm curious, when do you plan on playing Geometry Dash again?
I honestly do want your help on that level I started playing.
I wonder if Furret would be up to helping me
Wait I missed what you said?
I kinda wish it was you giving me the tips
Oooh maybe Firework could help me on the level!
I'm going to start dinner. Good luck! snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv
Im done with day 2 of the grind
Guess the progress i have rn
But i got 3 attempts past 65 rn
First I got 69, then 68 twice, then I got 71 and after that I got 72
69 was a scam, 68 2x were both to a stupid death...
71 was pretty fair but 72 was a dumb one again
yo champ whats up, gl today once again  DogChamp 👍
well havent done much today, but fine overall. Hows stage 3 so far, do you notice a diff spike compared to stage 2?
I mean you could take your time when you pass conveyor
Also did you see we got a 1st victor on Ashley wave trials?
He's rn the 12th best player on pointercrate
so youre going for every secret area ?
I hope it possible on this alignment
the main thing with secret 3 is that its pretty chill and easy most of the time and then it just hits you with the hardest jump you will ever see in your life
like this save your on right now is prob the hardest one in the whole room fromwhat i remember
so its one of those ones where its only used in 100%
it goes beep beep if your in a room with a crystal!
i mean id reccomend doing it just for needle practice
cause like stage 4 is HARD HARD you for sure wanna have at least a few hard screens under your belt before entering it i reckon
2nd jump seems like you have to do a lower jump
yeah this whole save was hard for me
Its p much this but in celeste
i tried serotonin its so jank
i think this style of gameplay does not translate to celeste well at all
mostly cause of celeste speedup and slowdown movement times
You see what I did there @mr_hecc
im pretty sure the allign right here is terrible
like bottom 1 allign for this jump
yeah its the same allign on both walls actually
You know that mk wii battle arena with the chain chomp roulette thing?
alligns are more based on what tile your in when you allign rather than the wall itself (for 1x1 blocks anyways)
This is some JAM right here
Chain chomp wheel is the best battle arena Nintendo ever made
Omg I wanna suggest jamjam but the reward is on timeout
Oh no I have the most evil thought ever
Spike?! Who the fuck is Spike?! Have you ever heard of Spike?!
Also have you taken a look at the ost things I sent you?
rain is fine i like rain
no it works 100% of the time
from the allign on the save
i would have tried to jump in between the ceiling spikes too tbh LUL
and from the allign in the drop
unless you carry an allign from a previous save there is no way to lose the allign for that to work
beneath the mask fans be like "im a shapeshifter"
also i died to the final jump the like mini gate like twice its wholesome
you cant shoot the save from there
Oh yeah my grandfather and I got into an argument today when we were in the car
I was driving innocently and slowly and he was yelling at me saying "don't hit any of those damn bushes!"
did you call him the G word
And I was nowhere near the mailboxes and he was telling me to watch out for the stuff on the road
I don't know, but I pissed him off even more by making it look like I was going to hit bins then swerved away from them at the very last second.
I was in so much trouble!
What the fuck is a geezer?
not really a slur but like an insult towards old people specifically
Kai what do you think of what I did?
I got in trouble, but it was worth it, I don't care!
Eh, I would rather just pretend I'm going to run shit over.
He needs to take a colorblind test
Kai what do you think of what I did?
When my grandfather was telling me how to drive?
wait i dont recognize this song cause i havent beaten this fight yet
oh my gosh the song is 3 minutes long i didnt realise it was such a long fight
thats gonna be harder than i thought lmao
Kai I know you think I'm innocent
if the world would end, id like to hear this song
But I have a bad reputation! snwbeaLol snwbeaLol
nah its fine lmao its not much of a spoiler
I've been meaning to ask you Kai, do you think I'm still innocent?
the REAL spoiler is that THE KAMILIA FINAL BOSS IS 30 MINUTES LONG WATCH OUT KA1 ITS HALF AN HOUR OF PATTERNS WATCH OUT
i know how long it is but i wont say
Kai Bear do you think I'm still innocent?
hopefully we can see your clear secret 5 too ustraaPausers
im excited for the ka1 secret 5 arc
I guess I'll ask you the question later
That's not the question I asked!
for context secrets 1-4 in total took me about 13ish hours secret 5 took about 30 it is HARD hard
I asked you if you still thought I was innocent!
You used to think I was innocent
And then I told you what I did today and it finally proved you wrong
Earlier this year, you told me I was innocent.
No it was earlier this year snwbeaLol
It was like February or March when I was confused about a dirty name on a Celeste map
And you said I was better off not knowing because I was innocent.
Okay I need to take a shower. Good luck!! snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv
I'll behave next time I'm behind the wheel
Oh don't forget I sent you a DM last night for you to check!
yeah this save is ultra difficult
I figured I would remind you about the message I sent you before I go
i still have no idea how to do it consistently
cause like even a 1f jump dosent work
i think its just straight up a frame perfect
i think its just straight up on a 2f jump works and nothing else works
its so scary though especially at the end of the save
oh btw have you heard about the celeste gold berries event? its 3 months long so its not like theres a big rush but i think its pretty neat
splash looks so cool ive never played it though
oh yeah it said you were allign 2 instead of 0
btw is Alignement intended or just an exploit/trick ?
from what i can tell its unintended cause like who would make that a feature but also the person who made iwbtg made iwbtg so like its up in the air
i could totally see them sitting at their computer being like "what if even the very system of movement in this game was a troll too"
yeah thats what i think too

its funny im pretty sure despite this screen being a decent amount easier to clear than secret 2 im pretty sure its decently harder than secret 2 to beat deathless just because of how inconsistent it is
i really wanna do deathless runs on this game at some point, not like big ones or anything but like screens deathless like the secrets
and for sure stage 1 deathless is possible and stage 2 might be too
anything further and thats like waaaaayyy far out of my grasp
me on my way to spend 1000 hours getting the perfect run and then die to hades being hades (i was 1f off of an imput) (it will take another 1000 hours to get back here)
hades, rz and guy tower ... i still have nightmares from that
unironically i think hades screens are my least favorite in the entire game
good luck when you get there ka1!
@RibJegres i remember getting unfathombaly lucky with RZ and i think it still took 4 hours
i mostly enjoy public lobbies of among us, but as like a once every few months play one game kinda deal
public lobbies can be either the funniest things imagineable or 5 racists arguing over whos the bigger bigot and theres no inbetween
holding left there is unfortunatly where actual subpixels come in im pretty sure
cause this game does have real subpixels, just only vertical ones and no horizontal ones
its pretty much just luck weather it will line up or not lmao
i think he's rdy, he is the one
he might just be... the Wanna Kill The Kamilia 3...
So much for ending stream Kappa
I forgot how good this song is!
How did we go from suspenseful music to this? snwbeaLol
I'm going to head off. Good luck!! snwbeaLuv snwbeaLuv
good bro ty did some mario maker and then mario kart
got 8600 vr back in mario kart world so that was cool
